description: Your goal is to compute the Coefficient of Performance (COP) for a heat pump monitoring system using 24 hours of 1-minute interval data from 'heatpump_elec' (Electrical input power in Watts) and 'heatpump_heat' (Thermal heat output in Watts). Create a new PHPFina feed named 'heatpump_cop' with tag 'heatpump' and unit 'COP'. Populate this feed by calculating COP = Heat / Elec for each timestamp, skipping any points where Elec is less than 50W. Generate a summary report at /home/ga/cop_report.txt with exactly five lines: Line 1 is the new feed ID, Line 2 is the count of data points inserted, Line 3 is the average COP, Line 4 is the maximum COP, and Line 5 is the minimum COP (rounding all COP values to 2 decimal places). Admin API keys are available in /home/ga/emoncms_apikeys.sh.
